channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — June 19, 2026
item.description: A major interim peace deal is signed between the United States and Iran, leading to the lifting of a naval blockade, even as the European Union remains divided on dialogue with Russia. Ukraine launches its largest drone attack on Moscow, prompting vo...

item.title: The VENCAst — June 17, 2026
item.description: This is The VENCAst. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, bringing you the latest news and analysis. Today is Wednesday, June 17, 2026.

item.title: The VENCAst — June 16, 2026
item.description: This is The VENCAst, your daily briefing on global events, technology, and what's shaping our world. I am Your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, and today is Tuesday, June 16, 2026. On today's program, we will delve into the details of a prelimin...
